---
name: Bug report
about: Report a bug or unexpected behaviour
title: "[BUG] "
labels: bug
assignees: ""
---

## Describe the Bug

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Start Neo4j with `docker compose up -d`
2. Run `npm run dev` in `ui/`
3. Navigate to ...
4. See error

## Expected Behaviour

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behaviour

What actually happened. Include error messages or screenshots if relevant.

## Environment

| Item    | Version                      |
| ------- | ---------------------------- |
| OS      | e.g. macOS 14 / Ubuntu 22.04 |
| Docker  | e.g. 24.0                    |
| Node.js | e.g. 20.x                    |
| Neo4j   | 5 Community (Docker image)   |
| Browser | e.g. Chrome 124              |

## Additional Context

Any other context about the problem (logs, Cypher queries, Neo4j Browser output, etc.).
